sections.title: When Spoken to before player needs a Special Egg

lines.speaker: The mouth of Clarence
lines.text: A cock-a-doodle hello to you! Caw!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Excuse me?

lines.speaker: The mouth of Clarence
lines.text: I speak for Clarence, and he bids you good day.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Clarence?

lines.speaker: The mouth of Clarence
lines.text: The rooster you see before you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You speak for him?

lines.speaker: The mouth of Clarence
lines.text: I speak for him, he speaks through me, I speak through her. It is not important.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So I'm talking to you?

lines.speaker: The mouth of Clarence
lines.text: Yes, you are talking to me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Which me is that? You or the other one?

lines.speaker: The mouth of Clarence
lines.text: Now I'm lost. Who am I?

lines.speaker: The mouth of Clarence
lines.text: You're you and I'm me.

lines.speaker: The mouth of Clarence
lines.text: I'm me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This is too confusing, I'll see you later.

lines.speaker: The mouth of Clarence
lines.text: Who? Me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Both of you.

sections.title: When spoken to while a player needs a Special Egg
Talking to The mouth of Clarence after getting the egg

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks again for the egg.

lines.speaker: The mouth of Clarence
lines.text: You are welcome! Cluck!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again Clarence.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh and uh, hello your mouthiness.

lines.speaker: The mouth of Clarence
lines.text: What can two do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need another special egg.

lines.speaker: The mouth of Clarence
lines.text: You don't have enough space for one of my special eggs. Come back when you do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay then, thanks anyway.

lines.speaker: The mouth of Clarence
lines.text: There you go! Use it wisely!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, I'm looking for a special egg, I don't suppose you could give me one?

lines.speaker: The mouth of Clarence
lines.text: A special egg? All eggs are special.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes I know that, but I need a particularly special egg.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have one of those?

lines.speaker: The mouth of Clarence
lines.text: One moment, we shall produce one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But you're a... Rooster? And... A lady?

lines.speaker: The mouth of Clarence
lines.text: Rooster and lady yes this is true. But there is more than one way to make an egg.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Unfortunately I don't have space to carry around your questionable egg at the moment.

lines.speaker: The mouth of Clarence
lines.text: Suit yourself!

lines.speaker: The mouth of Clarence
lines.text: There you go! Produced from my pocket, you see.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well that's a relief. Thanks.

lines.speaker: The mouth of Clarence
lines.text: Ah, hello again, special egg person.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: The mouth of Clarence
lines.text: We, that is to say, I, have decided, that you will receive no more special eggs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, well I don't actually need any more, so that's fine.

lines.speaker: The mouth of Clarence
lines.text: Oh, you aren't devastated? Tormented by this great denial of eggs?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not really.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks again for the egg.

lines.speaker: The mouth of Clarence
lines.text: Curses!

lines.speaker: The mouth of Clarence
lines.text: And you're welcome! Cluck.
